textByHash.12c3039f53c5ec7e6d549fa2ab922aa870b39260: I make flower crowns in many different colours. I'm wearing one right now!
textByHash.1c26820bb01647c76f9b89864ada70cbfc06cb68: Oh, you appear to already have one of those.
textByHash.2302172505ca836f3860ae2096753560c55018f1: You're welcome to have one if you'd like, just come back and ask me, anytime!
textByHash.2d01e366e1740992a897783ff816e708ae201e93: Don't underestimate the power of a little splash of colour!
textByHash.301c1038f7891074d8ebac125a392d73d51cf235: I've been getting lots of visitors too. Many flower traders from across the lands have paid the meadow a visit.
textByHash.31e6d83e05d7fa72d0c7c714d884de32dae9cefc: Everyone turned up in colourful outfits, it was like a sea of rainbows.
textByHash.32effe9143ecd24c66362821e5810068f41632e6: Turns out the spell we cast was more powerful than we first thought.
textByHash.33b6cd92fe3fa7436f5c4af0e60001bcf01fb0c2: You were? I didn't see you!
textByHash.3b0a6dffc74eeab96aaa44f2e801fad6c671dd6b: I've even traded with a few for some new flower seeds with different colours!
textByHash.3c567b945bca79e38ecfdf60f43caed87053b47c: So many flower crowns too! I was a bit worried the large pile I'd made of them would go to waste, but in the end I almost ran out!
textByHash.3d5a8e48343399cd534b45079be3b58c2287321b: It truly was, and so many flower crowns too! I was a bit worried the large pile I'd made of them would go to waste, but in the end I almost ran out!
textByHash.4bf87d0742fd0f472216369074eb12ba6b8bae9e: I know! It didn't always look like this though. It used to be dull and grey!
textByHash.530c813d2b8f51f1d9310796a26a951bcc114d5f: Yes! Did you have a good time?
textByHash.5c4c70f3507289bcefa9ffe603f2db50e76f2bce: So powerful that it made eight new colourations, all as beautiful as the first!
textByHash.79da8ab5f731dfdda046a23851c399e4cdbc9f7c: Lots of things! It's been pretty busy. There was even a huge colourful parade with thousands of people, and they chose this meadow as the starting place!
textByHash.85bc3a9a40f0f10ef9c9e4c0648efcb60ef4df28: That is a good point. I'll get to making some more right away.
textByHash.8983cef06c94c3fd9012f652425a0efe6df1abc6: I know! Thank you again for your help with it. It fills me with happiness to see so much colour.
textByHash.90603f4d6dda4072145af8a9ab0502d1641c5f79: Well as you may have noticed, you can change the colours of the flowers on your flower crown now!
textByHash.91f1b01f4a06fec1d6f6bd615b4184d389ca5e3f: Sounds good to me, gives me time to get lots made in advance.
textByHash.93100cc8e01e5dfab46e4a953d82071c257d34ad: We are currently scouting locations for it. I have a good idea of the kind of place I'm looking for, and I hope we can find it soon. I'll let you know if we need your help.
textByHash.a3593ec81d53542642a4863d0e046b8f3cb8ce55: It was! The news travelled far. I've been getting lots of visitors. Many flower traders from across the lands have paid the meadow a visit.
textByHash.aa9ee1ddcf12464343bb4b6558c415f0291a2cf1: The one in the colourful outfit...?
textByHash.c8be0283ea4b2f5ed9dee1c425577c43c10ad51e: You should have all of the old rainbow items now!
textByHash.e099f3931ad4b7324397ccec3589aac788091b83: An adventurer came along and helped me out. We cast a magic spell using flower seeds, and it created this lovely sunburst!
textByHash.f1bb809c62aa412ee3969b3466168e0f3c886718: Right, well I clearly have work to be getting on with. See you soon!
textByHash.f2f2b05f8d13f1f7ff4980851ccc0231abd82146: Absolutely! I have a cape, shirt, jumper, flower crown and scarf for you. Which would you like?
